distinctive_elements: SNES version notably lacks in-game music unlike other platform versions

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (NBA Jam SNES article)
note: Available sources contain no documented music parameters (tempo, keys, chord progressions, tracks, or SFX characteristics). The TCRF source explicitly states the SNES version is 'notorious for not having any music during gameplay unlike other versions of the game.' No musical data is documented in provided sources.
